---
title: "Piotr Zulawski"
page-layout: full
---

Hi there. Welcome to my website, which holds an eclectic collection of my projects. If any of it is of interest, please feel free to contact me via [email](mailto:piotr.zulawski@gmail.com).

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
<a href="cycling/index.qmd" class="home-card">
<div class="home-card-img">
<img src="/images/home-cycling.png" alt="Cycling">
</div>
<div class="home-card-body">
<h3>Cycling</h3>
<p>My Adventures With Time Trialling</p>
</div>
</a>
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
<a href="machine-learning/index.qmd" class="home-card">
<div class="home-card-img">
<img src="/images/home-programming.gif" alt="Programming">
</div>
<div class="home-card-body">
<h3>Code</h3>
<p>Machine Learning &amp; Game Development</p>
</div>
</a>
:::

::: {.g-col-4}
<a href="other/cycling-data-analysis.qmd" class="home-card">
<div class="home-card-img">
<img src="/images/home-other.png" alt="Other">
</div>
<div class="home-card-body">
<h3>Other</h3>
<p>Miscellaneous Items</p>
</div>
</a>
:::

::::
